node.data: {"M8376":{"lit":"բարձրագու<lb xml:id=\"l104229890\" facs=\"#z104229890\" n=\"11\" resp=\"#u2140\" break=\"no\"/>նի","line":{"facs":"#z104229889","resp":"#u2140","break":"no","xml:id":"l104229889","n":"10"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"8376-015a"},"n":"բարձրագունի"},"V1294":{"lit":"բարձրագու<lb xml:id=\"l104423687\" facs=\"#z104423687\" n=\"20\" resp=\"#u2140\" break=\"no\"/>նի","line":{"facs":"#z104423686","resp":"#u2140","xml:id":"l104423686","n":"19"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"9095 copy"},"n":"բարձրագունի"},"M695":{"lit":"բարձրա<lb xml:id=\"l103912726\" facs=\"#z103912726\" n=\"6\" resp=\"#u2140\" break=\"no\"/>գունի","line":{"facs":"#z103912725","resp":"#u2140","xml:id":"l103912725","n":"5"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"695-287a"},"n":"բարձրագունի"},"M892":{"lit":"բարձրագունի","line":{"facs":"#z104346567","resp":"#u2140","break":"no","xml:id":"l104346567","n":"2"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"892-190a"},"n":"բարձրագունի"},"M6712":{"lit":"բարձրագ<lb xml:id=\"l104385453\" facs=\"#z104385453\" n=\"9\" resp=\"#u2140\" break=\"no\"/>ունի","line":{"facs":"#z104385452","resp":"#u2140","break":"no","xml:id":"l104385452","n":"8"},"column":{"n":"1"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"6712-124a"},"n":"բարձրագունի"},"M9307":{"lit":"բարձրագունի","context":"text/body/ab[25]","n":"բարձրագունի"}}
